creator: bdrewery@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Sean Bruno from comment #3)
> https://github.com/freebsd/poudriere/commit/
> 6b1ddeb7faff240993188dd430a0be9dc8b6d802
> 
> I think we want to revert this.  Mikhail and I have tested that this does
> indeed break things badly.  With this reverted, help2man builds fine.

That -j1 change is a year old. Did you link the wrong commit?
